user:

Your current policy: sharing_intent=generous, share_min_soc_frac=0.2, distrusted_peers=[].
Your latest belief: Six peers at imminent battery failure; r3c4 also depleting; aggressive geographic sharing is the only path to prevent cascading collapse in final 6.5 hours..
